name: @presetter/monorepo
description: Make project configurations clean with presets
author: Alvis HT Tang <alvis@hilbert.space>

scripts.postinstall: presetter bootstrap --projects . --projects e2e --projects website --projects packages/* --projects presets/*
scripts.trust: command -v jq >/dev/null || { echo 'jq is required for the trust script' >&2; exit 1; }; npm_version=$(npm --version); npm_major=${npm_version%%.*}; npm_rest=${npm_version#*.}; npm_minor=${npm_rest%%.*}; if [ "$npm_major" -lt 11 ] || { [ "$npm_major" -eq 11 ] && [ "$npm_minor" -lt 16 ]; }; then echo "npm >=11.16.0 is required for npm trust --allow-publish (found $npm_version)" >&2; exit 1; fi; (npm whoami --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org >/dev/null 2>&1 || npm login --auth-type=web --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org) && echo 'Authorize npm trust once and enable the 5-minute 2FA skip when prompted.' >&2 && npm trust list @presetter/types && pnpm --filter './packages/**' --filter './presets/**' --workspace-concurrency=4 exec sh -ec 'json=$(npm trust list --json) || exit $?; id=$(printf "%s\n" "$json" | jq -r '\''if type == "object" and has("error") then error(.error.summary // .error.code) elif type == "array" then .[0].id // empty else .id // empty end'\'') || exit $?; if [ -n "$id" ]; then npm trust revoke --id="$id"; fi; npm trust github --repository alvis/presetter --file release.yaml --allow-publish --yes; sleep 2'
